mapper.select: /* 라이브러리 에이전트 목록 조회 library.selectAgentListForLibrary */ SELECT A.AGENT_ID AS AGENT_ID , A.AGENT_NM AS AGENT_NM , A.SVC_TY AS SVC_TY , B.CODE_NM AS SVC_TY_NM , A.DESCRIPTION AS DESCRIPTION , C.ETC1 AS API_PORT , C.ETC2 AS API_ENDPOINT , A.API_URL_CD AS API_URL_CD , A.SORT_ORD AS SORT_ORD , A.USE_YN AS USE_YN , A.ICON_ID AS ICON_ID , A.COLOR_ID AS COLOR_ID , D.ICON_CLASS_NM AS ICON_CLASS_NM , E.COLOR_HEX AS COLOR_HEX FROM TB_AGT A LEFT JOIN TB_CODE B ON A.SVC_TY = B.CODE_ID AND B.CODE_GRP_ID = 'AT000001' LEFT OUTER JOIN TB_CODE C ON C.CODE_GRP_ID = 'AA000001' AND C.USE_YN = 'Y' AND C.CODE_ID = A.API_URL_CD LEFT JOIN TB_ICON D ON A.ICON_ID = D.ICON_ID LEFT JOIN TB_COLOR E ON A.COLOR_ID = E.COLOR_ID WHERE 1=1 ORDER BY A.SORT_ORD, A.AGENT_ID

/* Agent 서브 설정 일괄 조회 library.selectAgentSubCfgListByAgentIds */ SELECT S.SUB_CFG_ID , S.AGENT_ID , S.SUB_TY , S.ADDITIONAL_CONFIG , S.USE_YN , S.CREATE_DT , S.MODIFY_DT FROM TB_AGT_SUB_CFG S WHERE 1=1 AND S.AGENT_ID IN
#{agentId}
/* 테이블 데이터 조회 library.selectTableData */ SELECT A.LOG_ID , A.TABLE_DATA , A.CHART_OPTION FROM TB_CHAT_LOG A WHERE 1=1 AND A.LOG_ID = #{logId}

/* 참조 매뉴얼(문서) 목록 조회 library.selectDocList */ SELECT B.DOC_FILE_ID , B.FILE_NAME , B.FILE_PATH , B.FILE_SIZE , B.FILE_TYPE , A.RELATED_PAGES FROM TB_CHAT_REF A INNER JOIN TB_DOC_FILE B ON A.DOC_FILE_ID = B.DOC_FILE_ID WHERE 1=1 AND A.LOG_ID = #{logId} ORDER BY A.CHAT_REF_ID

/* 카드 상세 조회 library.selectCardDetail */ SELECT A.CARD_ID , A.USER_ID , A.CATEGORY_ID , C.CATEGORY_NM , A.LOG_ID , A.SVC_TY , A.TITLE , A.TAGS , A.PIN_YN , A.ARCHIVE_YN , A.ARCHIVE_DT , A.SORT_ORD , A.SQL_CODE , A.NEW_YN , A.USE_YN , A.CREATE_DT , A.MODIFY_DT , B.Q_CONTENT , B.R_CONTENT , B.TTSQ , B.REPORT_HTML , D.AGENT_ID , D.AGENT_NM , E.ICON_CLASS_NM , F.COLOR_HEX FROM TB_KNOW_CARD A LEFT JOIN TB_CHAT_LOG B ON A.LOG_ID = B.LOG_ID LEFT JOIN TB_KNOW_CAT C ON A.CATEGORY_ID = C.CATEGORY_ID AND A.USER_ID = C.USER_ID LEFT JOIN TB_AGT D ON B.AGENT_ID = D.AGENT_ID LEFT JOIN TB_ICON E ON D.ICON_ID = E.ICON_ID LEFT JOIN TB_COLOR F ON D.COLOR_ID = F.COLOR_ID WHERE 1=1 AND A.USE_YN = 'Y'
AND A.CARD_ID = #{cardId}

/* 보관된 카드 목록 조회 library.selectArchiveCardList */ SELECT A.CARD_ID , A.USER_ID , A.CATEGORY_ID , A.LOG_ID , A.SVC_TY , A.TITLE , A.TAGS , A.PIN_YN , A.ARCHIVE_YN , A.ARCHIVE_DT , A.SORT_ORD , A.SQL_CODE , A.NEW_YN , A.USE_YN , A.CREATE_DT , A.MODIFY_DT , B.Q_CONTENT , B.R_CONTENT , B.TTSQ , D.AGENT_ID , D.AGENT_NM , E.ICON_CLASS_NM , F.COLOR_HEX FROM TB_KNOW_CARD A LEFT JOIN TB_CHAT_LOG B ON A.LOG_ID = B.LOG_ID LEFT JOIN TB_AGT D ON B.AGENT_ID = D.AGENT_ID LEFT JOIN TB_ICON E ON D.ICON_ID = E.ICON_ID LEFT JOIN TB_COLOR F ON D.COLOR_ID = F.COLOR_ID WHERE 1=1 AND A.ARCHIVE_YN = 'Y' AND A.USE_YN = 'Y' AND A.USER_ID = #{userId} ORDER BY A.ARCHIVE_DT DESC

/* 휴지통 카드 목록 조회 library.selectTrashCardList */ SELECT A.CARD_ID , A.USER_ID , A.CATEGORY_ID , A.LOG_ID , A.SVC_TY , A.TITLE , A.TAGS , A.PIN_YN , A.ARCHIVE_YN , A.ARCHIVE_DT , A.SORT_ORD , A.SQL_CODE , A.NEW_YN , A.USE_YN , A.CREATE_DT , A.MODIFY_DT , B.Q_CONTENT , B.R_CONTENT , B.TTSQ , D.AGENT_ID , D.AGENT_NM , E.ICON_CLASS_NM , F.COLOR_HEX FROM TB_KNOW_CARD A LEFT JOIN TB_CHAT_LOG B ON A.LOG_ID = B.LOG_ID LEFT JOIN TB_AGT D ON B.AGENT_ID = D.AGENT_ID LEFT JOIN TB_ICON E ON D.ICON_ID = E.ICON_ID LEFT JOIN TB_COLOR F ON D.COLOR_ID = F.COLOR_ID WHERE 1=1 AND A.USE_YN = 'N' AND A.USER_ID = #{userId} ORDER BY A.MODIFY_DT DESC
/* 차트 통계 속성 목록 조회 library.selectChartStatList */ SELECT A.STAT_ID , A.STAT_NM FROM stat_attr A WHERE 1=1 AND A.USE_AT = 'Y'

/* 차트 상세 코드 목록 조회 library.selectChartDetailCdList */ SELECT B.DETAIL_ITEM_CD , B.DETAIL_ITEM_CODE_NM AS DETAIL_ITEM_NM FROM stat_detail_item_grp A LEFT OUTER JOIN stat_detail_item B ON B.DETAIL_ITEM_GRP_ID = A.DETAIL_ITEM_GRP_ID WHERE 1=1 AND A.USE_AT = 'Y' AND B.USE_AT = 'Y'

/* 지식카드 차트 목록 조회 library.selectKnowChartList */ SELECT CHART_ID , CARD_ID , CHART_TYPE , CHART_TARGET_KEY , Y_AXIS_KEYS , SERIES_KEY , STAT_ID_FILTER , STACK_YN , DUAL_AXIS_YN , YL_CHART_TYPE , YR_CHART_TYPE , SORT_ORD , CREATE_DT FROM TB_KNOW_CARD_CHART WHERE CARD_ID = #{cardId} ORDER BY SORT_ORD ASC, CREATE_DT ASC
/* 카드의 질의/응답 본문 조회 library.selectCardChatContent */ SELECT A.Q_CONTENT , A.R_CONTENT FROM TB_CHAT_LOG A INNER JOIN TB_KNOW_CARD B ON A.LOG_ID = B.LOG_ID WHERE 1=1 AND B.CARD_ID = #{cardId}
/* 템플릿 정보 조회 library.selectTmpl */ SELECT A.TMPL_TYPE , A.LLM_PROMPT , A.TMPL_HTML FROM TB_TMPL A WHERE 1=1 AND A.TMPL_ID = #{tmplId}
/* 템플릿 필드 목록 조회 library.selectTmplFieldList */ SELECT A.JSON_KEY , A.FIELD_NM , A.MULTILINE_YN , A.LAYOUT_TYPE FROM TB_TMPL_FIELD A WHERE 1=1 AND A.TMPL_ID = #{tmplId} ORDER BY A.SORT_ORD
/* 동일 방의 최신 리포트 채팅 로그 library.selectLastReportChatLog */ SELECT REPORT_DATA AS reportData , IDX_NO AS idxNo FROM TB_REPORT_CHAT_LOG WHERE ROOM_ID = #{roomId} ORDER BY IDX_NO DESC LIMIT 1
